name: Peaktab
description: Daily photo, time, quote, and Pomodoro focus mode.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.unsplash.com; connect-src https://api.unsplash.com https://images.unsplash.com; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com
